finding_results.notes: Reworked the press-response beat so Marisol names immediate family fallout (mother bleeding during wake rupture; sister restricting access to Leo) and explicitly owns choosing the mic before refusing a false eulogy. Removed the polished abstract moral framing as the first substantive answer.
finding_results.summary: Press exchange now lands concrete interpersonal consequence and self-implication first, preserving scene pressure without sanitizing or retreating into quote-ready abstraction.

summary: Addressed the HIGH craft blocker by revising the wake press beat to prioritize direct family damage and accountability over rhetorical generalization.
